title: Headset settings are changed
scenario: Headset settings changed in Poly Studio Mobile app are not reflected correctly on the Lens tenant Inventory or Device user profile
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Note the current settings (e.g., ANC mode, Transparency mode, Equalizer preset, etc.).
4. Log in to the Lens tenant (Inventory or Device user profile) via a web browser.
5. Locate the registered headset and verify its settings match the values observed in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and change a setting value (e.g., toggle ANC from On to Off, or change an Equalizer preset).
7. Confirm the change is applied on the device (e.g., hear the audio mode change).
8. Refresh the Lens tenant page for the same headset.
9. Verify the new setting values are displayed on the Lens tenant page.
expected: The Lens tenant page displays the updated settings values that match the changes made in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
